backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Story and UserProfile types, with role-based access control for admin story management and per-principal user profile CRUD operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (auth, splash screen, dashboard, story detail, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'History Tales' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (splash, login, setup, dashboard, story detail, subscription) and an AuthGuard that handles initialization loading and theme persistence.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Authenticated app shell providing a sticky header with logo, navigation links, language selector, theme toggle, logout button, and a mobile menu, wrapping page content via an Outlet.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Compact EN/HI/GU toggle button group that reads and updates the user's preferred language via the useUserPreferences hook.
frontend/src/components/LogoutButton.tsx: Button component that clears the Internet Identity session and React Query cache when clicked to log the user out.
frontend/src/components/StoryCard.tsx: Renders a clickable card for a single story, displaying a localized title, summary, and a category icon with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between dark and light mode, showing a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching stories, retrieving the caller's user profile, and mutating user profile data via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTextToSpeech.ts: Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech API to provide speak and stop functions with language locale mapping and speaking state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserPreferences.ts: Exposes user language preference and premium status derived from the user profile, with helpers to update language or upgrade to premium.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for a parchment-themed light and dark color system, and typography using Playfair Display and Lato fonts.
frontend/src/lib/storyUtils.ts: Utility functions for extracting localized text from multilingual story fields (title, summary, content) based on the selected app language.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page displaying a hero banner, search input, optional premium upgrade prompt, and a filterable list of story cards.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login page with a branding panel listing app features and a right panel with an Internet Identity login button, redirecting to the dashboard if already authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: Displays a one-step profile setup screen that saves a default user profile (English, non-premium) via mutation and then navigates to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/SplashScreen.tsx: Shows an animated splash screen for 3 seconds, then redirects authenticated users to the dashboard or unauthenticated users to the login page.
frontend/src/pages/StoryDetailPage.tsx: Displays a single story's title, summary, and content in the user's preferred language, with a premium-gated text-to-speech read-aloud feature.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionPage.tsx: Renders the premium subscription page showing plan options and feature highlights, with an upgrade action and a banner for already-premium users.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom fonts (Playfair Display, Lato), oklch-based color tokens (gold, sepia, sidebar, chart, etc.), border radius variables, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for 'History Tales', documenting architecture (Flutter + Firebase, Provider state management, multilingual support, TTS, in-app purchases), existing implemented features, known issues, and required image assets.
